title: lithocarpus jordanae
intro: Lithocarpus jordanae, also known as the Jordan's tanbark oak, is a species of evergreen tree native to the southwestern United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lithocarpus jordanae include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the bark or leaves in water or a solvent, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
